name: Chili Seasoning Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a small bowl.
2. Blend well until fully incorporated.
3. Spoon the mixture into a 6-inch square of aluminum foil.
4. Fold the foil to make it airtight and label as Chili Seasoning Mix.
5. Store in a cool, dry place.
6. Use within 6 months.
Makes 1 package (about 1/4 cup) of mix. To make additional packages, increase ingredient amounts using the above recipe.
Chili:
1. Brown 1 pound of lean ground beef in a medium skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Drain excess fat.
3. Add 2 cans of kidney beans (15-1/2 ounces each).
4. Add 2 cans of tomatoes (16 ounces each).
5. Add 1 package of the Chili Seasoning Mix.
6. Reduce heat and simmer for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Makes 4 to 6 servings.
